ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, read-only) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "auth_provider" TEXT /* Authentication provider used by the user (e.g., email, OAuth, SSO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the repository was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the repository */,
  "default_branch" TEXT /* Name of the default branch for the repository */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the repository is private or public */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility level of the repository (e.g., public, private, internal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository that the project belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the project was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the leader of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path of the file within the repository */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository that the file belongs to */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project that the file belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the file */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the file content */,
  "is_binary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the file is binary */,
  "lock_status" TEXT /* Lock status of the file (e.g., unlocked, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directories" (
  "dir_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each directory */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the directory */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path of the directory within the repository */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository that the directory belongs to */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project that the directory belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the directory was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the directory */,
  "parent_dir_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent directory (for hierarchical structure) */,
  "is_binary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the directory contains binary files */,
  "lock_status" TEXT /* Lock status of the directory (e.g., unlocked, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dir_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directories_parent_dir_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_dir_id") REFERENCES directories ("dir_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directories_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directories_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file that was revised */,
  "dir_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the directory that was revised */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository that the revision belongs to */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project that the revision belongs to */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Revision number of the file or directory */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the revision */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the changes made in the revision */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch where the revision was made */,
  "merge_request_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the merge request if applicable */,
  "is_merge" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the revision is a merge */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Unique hash of the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_dir_id FOREIGN KEY ("dir_id") REFERENCES directories ("dir_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file that was translated */,
  "dir_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the directory that was translated */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository that the translation belongs to */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project that the translation belongs to */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the translation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the translation (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the translation was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the translation */,
  "translator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the translation */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who reviewed the translation */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the translation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_translator_id FOREIGN KEY ("translator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_dir_id FOREIGN KEY ("dir_id") REFERENCES directories ("dir_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caches" (
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cache entry */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository that the cache entry belongs to */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project that the cache entry belongs to */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file that the cache entry belongs to */,
  "dir_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the directory that the cache entry belongs to */,
  "cache_key" TEXT /* Cache key for the cache entry */,
  "cache_value" TEXT /* Cache value for the cache entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the cache entry was created */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the cache entry */,
  "expiry_time" TEXT /* Expiry time of the cache entry */,
  "hit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the cache entry has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cache_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caches_dir_id FOREIGN KEY ("dir_id") REFERENCES directories ("dir_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caches_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caches_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caches_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dav_caches" (
  "dav_cache_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each WebDAV cache entry */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository that the WebDAV cache entry belongs to */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project that the WebDAV cache entry belongs to */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file that the WebDAV cache entry belongs to */,
  "dir_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the directory that the WebDAV cache entry belongs to */,
  "dav_cache_key" TEXT /* WebDAV cache key for the cache entry */,
  "dav_cache_value" TEXT /* WebDAV cache value for the cache entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the WebDAV cache entry was created */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access to the WebDAV cache entry */,
  "expiry_time" TEXT /* Expiry time of the WebDAV cache entry */,
  "hit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the WebDAV cache entry has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dav_cache_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dav_caches_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dav_caches_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dav_caches_dir_id FOREIGN KEY ("dir_id") REFERENCES directories ("dir_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dav_caches_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_files" (
  "external_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external file */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository that the external file belongs to */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project that the external file belongs to */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file that the external file belongs to */,
  "dir_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the directory that the external file belongs to */,
  "external_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the external file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the external file was added */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the external file */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the external file in bytes */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the external file content */,
  "is_binary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the external file is binary */,
  "lock_status" TEXT /* Lock status of the external file (e.g., unlocked, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_files_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_files_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_files_dir_id FOREIGN KEY ("dir_id") REFERENCES directories ("dir_id")
)
